---
title: "Exploratory Data Analysis: Video Game Sales (1980-2016)"
author: "HAMMAD ZAHID"
date: "`https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/gregorut/videogamesales`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
    code_folding: show
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    latex_engine: xelatex
  github_document:
    toc: true
    html_preview: true
---
